D1.rationale: Per-AC table tracking all 16 ACs with PASS marks. Two ACs include specific counts. But most ACs lack verbatim command output in completion — only ✅ marks. At most 1 minor gap.

D2.rationale: 3 distinct independent reviewer files (code-reviewer, backend-architect, test-runner) with specific P0/P1 findings. Acceptance-test artifact exists. No trace events (pre-trace era). Missing traces prevent D2=5.

D3.rationale: Handoff acknowledgment documented. §9.2 Audit Trail with 2 pre-resolved expert reviews. 3rd reviewer during execution. Implementation decisions table. Missing explicit Ralph Loop state documentation.

D4.rationale: 2 deviations documented with rationale. Implementation decisions table with 4 entries. gate4_delta explicitly empty. No Friction Status table (pre-mandate).

D5.rationale: KA Q1 answered Yes with 4 specific CLI discoveries. But no journal entry referenced, no failure_mode documented, Q2/Q3 not formally addressed.
